summary: Iteration 2: Verified new TTS endpoint, Tashelhit (tamazight-souss) language addition, Listen/auto-speak UI wiring, and confirmed sign-language recorder modal is fully wired. All 12 backend pytest tests pass (including 3 new TTS tests + updated languages test asserting 8 languages and Tashelhit label). All targeted frontend flows verified on public URL: auto-speak-toggle swaps Volume2/VolumeX, language selector lists Tashelhit option, Darija text chat streams an assistant reply with Listen button under the bubble, clicking Listen fires POST /api/tts and receives HTTP 200 audio/mpeg with no JS errors, sign-language modal opens, shows camera-denied error gracefully in headless, and closes via close button. No bugs found.
critical_code_review_comments: Minor (carried over): logger is defined AFTER it is referenced inside async route handlers; works at runtime but cleaner to move logging.basicConfig + getLogger above the routes.
Minor: /api/tts has no rate limiting / cost ceiling. text is truncated to 4000 chars which is good, but consider basic per-session throttling to avoid abuse of paid TTS.

Minor: speak() in ChatMaroc.jsx does not abort an in-flight fetch when user toggles Stop while TTS is still being generated (only audio playback is paused). Low impact since TTS responses are usually <2s.
Minor: audio Blob URL created in speak() is only revoked in audio.onended — if user clicks Stop before audio ends, the object URL leaks until page unload.
Minor (carried over): uploaded audio/sign-video webm files in /uploads/* are never cleaned up.
Nice-to-have: TTS hardcodes voice 'nova' which doesn't sound natural for Arabic/Tamazight. Backend already accepts a voice param — frontend could expose it or pick a more region-appropriate default.
seed_data_creation: Tests use TEST_<uuid> session_id and clean up via DELETE /api/messages/{session_id} in module teardown.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test file /app/backend/tests/test_chatmaroc_api.py now has 12 tests including test_tts_basic (200 + audio/mpeg + MP3 magic bytes check), test_tts_empty (400), test_tts_custom_voice (alloy). test_languages asserts all 8 keys incl. tamazight-souss and verifies Tashelhit label. Frontend: in headless without audio device, after clicking Listen the button briefly shows Stop then resets to Listen because audio.play() onerror fires — this is expected and the /api/tts network call still returns 200 with mp3 bytes. No JS errors observed.
